noLinkedUser: No linked bot user was found for this account.
dashboardHomeDescription: Summary cards and quick links will appear here. Use the sidebar or search to open a section.

dashboardOverview.title: Overview
dashboardOverview.subtitle: Business health at a glance. Open a section for full detail.
dashboardOverview.financeCardHint: Live totals from your database. Jump to a section to edit.
dashboardOverview.chartOnlineSubtitle: Last 7 days from stored daily panel aggregates.
dashboardOverview.ttHttpNonStandard: Root URL returned a non-success HTTP code (common on 3x-ui when the web UI is under a sub-path). Response time still reflects network reachability.
dashboardOverview.ttHttpFail: No HTTP response from the panel root (timeout, DNS, TLS, or network error).
dashboardOverview.ttNetworkOk: The server returned an HTTP status line (host is reachable at TCP/TLS level).
dashboardOverview.ttDbActive: Panel row is active in the database.
dashboardOverview.ttDbInactive: Panel row is inactive in the database.
dashboardOverview.ttRttHint: Round-trip time for the HEAD/GET probe to the panel root URL.
dashboardOverview.compactSubtitle: Reachability and ping per panel (location = panel URL).
dashboardOverview.perfSubtitle: Attributed sales and wholesale cost for the last {{days}} days.
dashboardOverview.perfSalesHint: Purchase and renew totals billed under your reseller attribution.
dashboardOverview.perfWholesaleHint: Wholesale accrual in the selected window.
dashboardOverview.perfDownlineLifetimeHint: Lifetime downline count (not limited to the metrics window).
dashboardOverview.perfMarginDisclaimer: Margin is estimated and excludes site infrastructure costs.
dashboardOverview.perfReceiptsHint: Bank/card receipt amounts in the window (not the same as attributed sales).

monitoringPage.title: Monitoring
monitoringPage.subtitle: Host health, panel reachability, live online counts, and optional external HTTPS JSON endpoints.
monitoringPage.compactSubtitle: Online/offline and ping for each panel.
monitoringPage.externalEmpty: No external hosts configured. Add rows to the svp_monitor_hosts table (label, metrics_url, optional bearer_token).
monitoringPage.warnOnlineDrop: Online now is well below today’s max — possible issue.
monitoringPage.extHint: Each host must expose HTTPS JSON; values are flattened for charts.
monitoringPage.chartNoAggregateData: No stored daily aggregate data yet for the last 7 days.
monitoringPage.panelsPaginationHint: Pagination: {{total}} panels — open the Panels tab for the full list.
monitoringPage.scopedResellerHint: This is the same monitoring view as the site admin. Panel health may include shared infrastructure outside your reseller catalog.

plansAdmin.title: Plans
plansAdmin.subtitle: Manage catalog plans, pricing, and panel binding.
plansAdmin.rankSubtitle: Distinct bot users with a service on this plan (desc.).
plansAdmin.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. Services may still reference this plan.
plansAdmin.mutateInvalid: Plan data is incomplete or invalid (category, inbound, price, etc.).
plansAdmin.validationCategory: Choose a category for this panel, or ask an admin to add one under Plan categories.
plansAdmin.validationInbound: Inbound ID is required (ask admin to set default inbound on your panel or wholesale line).
plansAdmin.validationPrice: Enter a price greater than zero.
plansAdmin.validationPricePerGb: Enter a price per GB greater than zero.
plansAdmin.validationTrafficRange: Set a valid min/max GB range (min ≤ max, both at least 1).
plansAdmin.errorCode_invalid: Plan data is incomplete or invalid (category, inbound, price, etc.).
plansAdmin.errorCode_panel_not_allowed: You are not allowed to sell plans on this panel.
plansAdmin.errorCode_wholesale_line_not_assigned: This wholesale line is not assigned to your account.
plansAdmin.errorCode_wholesale_line_required: Select a wholesale line for this plan.
plansAdmin.errorCode_wholesale_line_invalid: The selected wholesale line is inactive or missing.
plansAdmin.errorCode_wholesale_line_no_tiers: The wholesale line has no pricing tiers configured.
plansAdmin.errorCode_wholesale_line_bad: Could not apply wholesale line settings to this plan.
plansAdmin.errorCode_below_reseller_floor: Price is below your minimum wholesale floor.
plansAdmin.errorCode_bad_actor: Reseller account is invalid for this action.
plansAdmin.errorCode_l2tp_forbidden_for_reseller: L2TP plans are not allowed on this panel for your account.
plansAdmin.errorCode_module_missing: A required module is missing on the server.
plansAdmin.noCategories: No categories for this panel — add one under Plan categories.
plansAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: Active and inactive counts reflect this page only; total is catalog-wide.
plansAdmin.catalogCardDesc: Default concurrent client count and price per extra slot (used when creating services or adding user slots).
plansAdmin.resellerNoPanels: No panel is linked to your account yet.
plansAdmin.resellerNoPanelsHint: Your reseller ID is {{svpUserId}}. An administrator must enable server access under Resellers and define wholesale pricing in Plans → Wholesale lines. Parent resellers only set minimum sale floors for direct children.
plansAdmin.resellerPanelDiagJoinable: Rows that match a catalog panel with access or price: {{n}}
plansAdmin.resellerPanelDiagOrphans: Panel IDs stored but missing from catalog (fix DB or re-save from admin): {{ids}}
plansAdmin.resellerPanelDiagInactive: Rows with access off and price 0: {{n}}
plansAdmin.connectionPresetHint: Inbound / protocol cannot be changed here; your administrator configures them per panel.
plansAdmin.minPriceHintPerGb: Minimum price per GB (your wholesale floor): {{min}}
plansAdmin.wholesaleLadderNext: Next tier: {{rate}} / GB ({{gb}} GB or {{toman}} toman to go)
plansAdmin.wholesaleLadderRenewNote: Per-GB plan renewals bill the customer but do not add wholesale ladder volume.
plansAdmin.minPriceHintFixedTotal: Minimum total for this volume (your wholesale floor): {{min}}
plansAdmin.wholesaleLineHint: Panel and connection are applied from the line on the server.
plansAdmin.resellerNoLinesHint: No wholesale lines are assigned to your account. Ask a site administrator to assign catalog lines under Resellers (after defining them in Plans → Wholesale lines).

wholesaleLinesAdmin.title: Wholesale lines
wholesaleLinesAdmin.subtitle: Reseller-facing catalog lines (label + color), mapped to a panel and tiered wholesale pricing.
wholesaleLinesAdmin.confirmDelete: Delete this wholesale line? Plans may reference it.
wholesaleLinesAdmin.label: Display label
wholesaleLinesAdmin.tiersHint: Thresholds are cumulative (no monthly reset). For each tier, both min GB and min toman (if set) must be met.

cardsAdmin.title: Bank cards
cardsAdmin.subtitle: Add, edit, activate, or remove payout cards shown to users.
cardsAdmin.dragHint: Drag cards to change display order in the bot.
cardsAdmin.deleteDescription: This removes the card from the catalog. It cannot be undone.
cardsAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: Active / inactive counts are for this page only; total is catalog-wide.
cardsAdmin.displayModeTitle: How cards appear in the bot
cardsAdmin.displayModeDesc: All cards at once, round-robin one at a time, or random one per checkout. When daily limits are full, rotation wraps from the start.
cardsAdmin.displayModeHint: Applies to the payment card step in the purchase flow. When every card hits its daily limit, checkout still rotates from the first card.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodsDesc: Enable or disable how users can pay in the bot checkout and wallet.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_c2c: Requires at least one active card with this method.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_crypto: Manual crypto; user uploads a receipt. Requires an active crypto card.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_crypto_auto: Automatic crypto via NOWPayments. Requires API key and an active card.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_bale_wallet: Bale in-app wallet. Requires a provider token in site or bot profile settings.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_site_wallet: Deduct balance at checkout for purchases when funds are sufficient.
cardsAdmin.paymentMethodHint_wallet_topup: Shows a top-up button on the wallet page so users can add balance themselves.
cardsAdmin.invalidHtmlResponse: Invalid server response — refresh the page and try again.
cardsAdmin.field_memoHint: Shown to the user if they must include a memo with the transfer.
cardsAdmin.field_cryptoAutoHint: NOWPayments uses the site API key. Add a label and optional network note for checkout.

receiptsAdmin.title: Receipts
receiptsAdmin.subtitle: Totals below are from the full receipts table; the list is the latest sample from the API.
receiptsAdmin.searchPlaceholder: Search by receipt ID, user, amount, transaction…
receiptsAdmin.settingsRejectHint: Configure default reject reasons in Site settings → Whitelabel.
receiptsAdmin.sampleHint: List shows the latest {{n}} receipts; aggregates above include every row.
receiptsAdmin.listPaginationHint: Receipt catalog: {{total}} total; aggregates above are global.
receiptsAdmin.emptyList: No receipts in this sample for the selected filter.
receiptsAdmin.invalidHtmlResponse: Invalid server response — refresh the page and try again.
receiptsAdmin.serverError: Server error — try again in a moment.
receiptsAdmin.reviewPendingHint: Pending receipts require review permission; only approved receipts are listed below.
receiptsAdmin.editAmountDesc: This updates the receipt amount and its linked pending transaction. Enter 0 for free.
receiptsAdmin.editAmountDescApproved: For approved top-ups, the user wallet balance is adjusted by the difference. Purchase receipts update accounting records only. Enter 0 for free.
receiptsAdmin.badAmount: Invalid amount (negative values are not allowed).
receiptsAdmin.amountTopupAdjusted: Amount updated and wallet balance adjusted.
receiptsAdmin.commissionReviewWarning: Referral commission was already paid; review commission manually if needed.
receiptsAdmin.rejectDialogDesc: Choose the reason that will be sent to the user in the bot.
receiptsAdmin.customRejectReasonPlaceholder: Optional; overrides the default reason for this receipt.
receiptsAdmin.rejectReasonsHint: One reason per line. Admins can select one when rejecting a receipt.

discountsAdmin.title: Discount codes
discountsAdmin.subtitle: Create and manage codes, limits, validity, and allowed purchase types.
discountsAdmin.readOnlyResellerHint: Discount codes are view-only in this dashboard. Create or edit codes in your reseller portal.
discountsAdmin.allowedPlansHint: Leave all unchecked for every plan.
discountsAdmin.userSearchPlaceholder: Filter users by ID or name…
discountsAdmin.deleteDescription: Existing uses stay in history; the code will be removed.
discountsAdmin.errorPlanOverlap: Another active code already covers one of these plans.
discountsAdmin.codeLockedHint: Code cannot be changed after creation (server rule).
discountsAdmin.statsPageBreakdown: List is paginated; totals for redemptions and discount are catalog-wide.

usersAdmin.title: Users
usersAdmin.subtitle: Pending registrations first; then all users returned by the dashboard API.
usersAdmin.listCapHint: Showing {{n}} user(s) in this load (server limit 500).
usersAdmin.searchHint: Matches internal ID, Telegram/Bale chat IDs, name, and phone.
usersAdmin.usersEmpty: No users in this list (pending may still appear above).

resellersAdmin.title: Resellers
resellersAdmin.subtitle: Create and manage resellers. Dashboard username and password (min 6 characters) enable /dashboard login; Telegram or Bale ID is an alternative. Other fields are optional.
resellersAdmin.createHint: One step: enter dashboard login, or at least one Telegram / Bale ID. Names, phone, and second platform ID are optional.
resellersAdmin.subResellerCreateHint: Creates a sub-reseller linked to your account (invited_by). Dashboard login or at least one Telegram / Bale ID is required.
resellersAdmin.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, @username, ID, or phone…
resellersAdmin.searchHint: Search is independent from the users tab.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesTitle: Which servers can this reseller use?
resellersAdmin.panelAccessLabel: Allow this panel for the reseller (required for Plans / dashboard)
resellersAdmin.panelAccessToggleAria: Allow reseller to use this server: {{label}}
resellersAdmin.panelPricesIncludePanelFloor: Include this panel (enter a minimum price per GB)
resellersAdmin.panelPricesNoRowsError: Nothing to save: enable at least one panel or enter a wholesale price greater than zero.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesDialogHintAdmin: Turn the switch on for each server this reseller may use. Wholesale price and server defaults are taken from the catalog plans (wholesale lines) — not entered here.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesCatalogWholesaleMissing: No wholesale line for this panel — add one under Plans → Wholesale lines before enabling access.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesDialogHintParentFloor: Turn the switch on for each server your direct child reseller may sell on. Previously saved minimum prices for that server are kept.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesDialogDescription: Reseller #{{id}}. Enable only the servers (panels) this reseller should see.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesDialogDescriptionParentFloor: Reseller #{{id}}. Choose which servers your direct child may use; optional minimum sale floors already stored are kept.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesParentCatalogNote: Only a WordPress administrator (manage_options) can grant wholesale/access rows that make panels appear for this child. Your save here updates minimum sale floors only.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesSkippedUnknownPanels: Ignored panel IDs not found in the catalog: {{ids}}
resellersAdmin.panelPricesSaveNoValidPanels: Nothing valid to save: every panel ID is missing from the catalog or invalid. Your previous wholesale/access rows were not cleared.
resellersAdmin.panelPricesParentFloorSavedHint: Minimum prices saved. If this reseller still sees no panels, an administrator must save «Panel prices» for them (wholesale/access table).
resellersAdmin.permissionsReadOnlyHint: You can view this reseller's permissions but only their parent or a site admin can change them.
resellersAdmin.wholesaleLinesAssignHint: Select which wholesale lines this reseller may sell. Tier ladders accrue per line.

resellerReportsAdmin.title: Reseller reports
resellerReportsAdmin.subtitle: Compare reseller downline size, sales, wholesale cost, and receipts for the selected period.
resellerReportsAdmin.downlineReportsHint: Performance of resellers in your downline (all depths). Your own metrics appear on the dashboard overview.
resellerReportsAdmin.backfillHint: Sales attribution uses billing_reseller_svp_id on transactions. Run reseller backfill under Resellers if older purchases are missing.
resellerReportsAdmin.marginDisclaimer: Margin is estimated (sales minus wholesale) and excludes site infrastructure costs.
resellerReportsAdmin.kpiSalesHint: Approved purchase and renew transactions billed under your reseller attribution (wallet debits).
resellerReportsAdmin.kpiWholesaleHint: Wholesale accrual cost in the selected window (may differ from sales timing).
resellerReportsAdmin.kpiMarginHint: Estimated sales minus wholesale in the window (excludes site infrastructure).
resellerReportsAdmin.kpiReceiptsHint: Bank/card receipt amounts in the window — not the same as attributed sales.
resellerReportsAdmin.chartSubtitle: Attributed sales vs wholesale cost across all resellers
resellerReportsAdmin.chartSubtitleFiltered: Daily trend for resellers matching your search filter
resellerReportsAdmin.chartEmpty: No sales or wholesale data in this period.
resellerReportsAdmin.colDownlineHint: Lifetime downline count (not limited to the selected window).
resellerReportsAdmin.colActiveSvcHint: Currently active services in downline (lifetime snapshot).
resellerReportsAdmin.colSalesHint: Attributed purchase/renew totals in the window.
resellerReportsAdmin.colWholesaleHint: Wholesale accrual cost for this reseller.

marketingLifecycleAdmin.title: Customer lifecycle
marketingLifecycleAdmin.subtitle: Retention, conversion, and automated win-back offers for the last {{days}} days.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.readOnlyResellerHint: Lifecycle rules and manual sends are managed by the site admin. You can review stats and offers here.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.chartSubtitle: Daily signups, first pending purchase, and first paid order
marketingLifecycleAdmin.chartEmpty: No funnel data in this period.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentSectionSubtitle: Eligible counts use your active rules per segment.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentHint_churned: Buyers who have not purchased again for a while.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentHint_never_purchased: Approved users with no successful purchase yet.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentHint_abandoned_checkout: Purchase orders stuck in pending status.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentHint_stale_buy_funnel: User stalled in bot buy flow without an open order.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentHint_expiring_renew: Active service expiring within the next days.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentPlaybook_churned: After N days without purchase, send a win-back offer (10–15% off) with 90-day cooldown. Personalize with {name} and {code}.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentPlaybook_never_purchased: 3–7 days after signup with no purchase, send a welcome offer with a max discount cap. Shorter cooldown (30 days).
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentPlaybook_abandoned_checkout: 24–48 hours after a pending order, reminder + short-lived code (2–3 days validity).
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentPlaybook_stale_buy_funnel: 48+ hours idle in bot buy state — nudge to complete checkout with a moderate discount.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.segmentPlaybook_expiring_renew: 7 days before expiry, renewal offer on Telegram and Bale.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.playbookSubtitle: Segment definitions, timing, and practical recommendations.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.reportsSubtitle: Sent, converted, and revenue per rule in the last {{days}} days.
marketingLifecycleAdmin.rulesSubtitle: Segment triggers, discount template, and bot message

resellerPanelsAdmin.title: Reseller panel access
resellerPanelsAdmin.subtitle: How many resellers can sell on each catalog panel (from panel prices / access).
resellerPanelsAdmin.hint: Edit per-reseller access under Resellers → panel prices, or add servers under Settings → 3x-ui panels.

userDetailAdmin.title: User management
userDetailAdmin.walletDeltaHint: Use the buttons below; enter a positive amount in toman.
userDetailAdmin.walletDialogHint: Enter a positive amount in toman.
userDetailAdmin.assignResellerHint: Link this customer to a reseller (sets invited_by).
userDetailAdmin.tooltipDeletePanelClient: Delete client on panel and soft-delete row
userDetailAdmin.tooltipAddSlots: Add concurrent user slots (paid flow helper)
userDetailAdmin.tooltipReduceSlots: Reduce concurrent user slots (clamped to zero)
userDetailAdmin.tooltipSetLimitIp: Set concurrent user cap (limitIp) on panel
userDetailAdmin.tooltipReduceDays: Reduce service days (expiry is clamped to now)
userDetailAdmin.confirmDeletePanelClient: This removes the client from the X-UI panel and soft-deletes the service row. This is not the same as soft-delete only. Continue?
userDetailAdmin.linkWpHint: Set the site user id to link this bot row to a site account (0 clears).
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHint: Same rules as admin bot: user must be approved; plan must be active. Per-GB plans require volume within min/max. Fixed plans ignore extra volume. Payment: free (gift + zero tx), wallet (charge price_new_service), invoice (pending tx to user chats). Provisioning uses Service_Provisioner on X-UI/L2TP.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintShort1: User must be approved; choose an active plan.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintReseller1: Customer must be approved; choose an active plan.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintReseller2: For per-GB plans, volume must be within the plan min–max.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintReseller3: Payment is debited from your reseller wallet (no free grant). You can also send an invoice to the customer chat.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintShort2: Per-GB plans: enter volume within the plan min–max range.
userDetailAdmin.createServiceHintShort3: Payment: free, wallet debit, or invoice to user chats.
userDetailAdmin.dlgRenewDesc: Extends the service for one billing cycle at the current quota.
userDetailAdmin.dlgTrafficDescAdd: Adds gigabytes to the service quota. Choose how to charge.
userDetailAdmin.dlgDaysDesc: Add or subtract calendar days (admin, no charge).
userDetailAdmin.dlgUsersDescAdd: Increase the simultaneous-user cap on the panel.
userDetailAdmin.dlgUsersDescReduce: Decrease the cap (free, clamped at zero).
userDetailAdmin.dlgLimitIpDesc: Sets the concurrent-user cap (limitIp) on the X-UI client.
userDetailAdmin.dlgRegenDesc: Creates a new client UUID on the panel. Subscription links may change.
userDetailAdmin.dlgRegenSubDesc: Creates a new subId on the panel. The old subscription URL will stop working.
userDetailAdmin.dlgRefreshDesc: Reloads inbound/client data from the panel into the database.
userDetailAdmin.dlgDeletePanelDesc: Removes the client from X-UI and soft-deletes the service row. Different from bot-only removal.
userDetailAdmin.dlgDeleteServiceDesc: Soft-delete: hidden from the user in Telegram/Bale; data kept for admin recovery.
userDetailAdmin.dlgTransferDesc: Move ownership to another user (#id, tg:…, or bale:…).
userDetailAdmin.estimatedCostNeedVolume: Enter a valid GB amount within the plan range to see cost.
userDetailAdmin.marketingOffersEmpty: No lifecycle offers for this user.
userDetailAdmin.referralsHint: Users who registered with this user as referrer.
userDetailAdmin.confirmDeleteService: This will remove the service from the user’s active list (soft delete). The user will no longer see it in the bot; recovery is database/admin only. Continue?
userDetailAdmin.receiptsEmpty: This user has no receipts matching the current filters.
userDetailAdmin.activity_balance_delta: Wallet adjusted by {{delta}} toman; new balance {{after}}.
userDetailAdmin.noteSyncHint: Panel remark may differ until next sync.

broadcastAdmin.title: Broadcast
broadcastAdmin.subtitle: Send rich text and up to 10 images (album on Telegram/Bale) to approved users. The scheduled task runner drains the queue in small batches.
broadcastAdmin.cronHint: For large audiences, configure the host task scheduler to run the application cron endpoint every minute so jobs do not stall. Tune batch size and delay in settings.
broadcastAdmin.composeHint: Toolbar: bold, italic, monospace, preformatted block, underline, strikethrough, spoiler, quote, and links. Telegram uses HTML formatting; Bale uses its own Markdown rules (bold * text *, italic _ text _, links [label](url)). Line breaks are preserved on both. Images: 1 = photo; 2–10 = album (caption on first only).
broadcastAdmin.baleFormatNote: Underline and strikethrough are Telegram-only; Bale may show them as plain text. Spoiler and expandable quote appear simplified on Bale.
broadcastAdmin.mediaHint: Up to 10 images (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP). First image carries the caption when sending an album.
broadcastAdmin.err_empty: Message and images cannot both be empty.
broadcastAdmin.err_no_recipients: No recipients match the selected bots.
broadcastAdmin.err_bad_type: Only JPEG, PNG, GIF, or WebP images are allowed.
broadcastAdmin.err_move_failed: Could not save the file on the server.
broadcastAdmin.err_no_url: Server did not return a file URL.
broadcastAdmin.cancelConfirm: Stop the rest of this broadcast? Messages already sent stay delivered; the remaining queue will be cancelled.
broadcastAdmin.err_not_cancellable: This broadcast cannot be stopped (already finished or cancelled).
broadcastAdmin.recipientStrip_partial_cancelled: Some delivered; the rest cancelled by admin.
broadcastAdmin.processQueueDone: Ran {{batches}} batch(es). Refresh the page if counts look stale.
broadcastAdmin.cronHintSysCron: If sending is stuck: scheduled tasks may only run when the site receives traffic. Add a real server cron (e.g. every minute) that hits your site’s cron URL as documented in hosting setup.
broadcastAdmin.scopedResellerHint: Broadcasts reach only users you may moderate. Site-wide audience selection requires the site admin dashboard.

botsAdmin.mainBotSectionDesc: Telegram and Bale tokens, admin IDs per platform, and reseller bots below. Webhook path secrets are generated on the server and are not shown here.
botsAdmin.title: Telegram & Bale bots
botsAdmin.subtitle: Bot tokens, optional Telegram secret header, admin chat IDs, and reseller bots.
botsAdmin.resellerBotsDesc: Each reseller can run a white-label bot. Configure tokens, webhooks, and admin IDs per reseller below.
botsAdmin.webhookSecretHint: Path webhook secrets are generated on the server and are not shown here.
botsAdmin.relayTelegramBanner: Telegram is routed through the relay server. Webhook registration, getMe, and diagnostics use the relay — configure it under Site settings → Telegram relay.
botsAdmin.relayPublicUrlReseller: Relay public URL for this reseller (optional separate domain)
botsAdmin.adminIdsCardDesc: Users with these numeric chat IDs can use admin commands. Add or remove one ID at a time.
botsAdmin.confirmDeleteWebhook: Remove the webhook from Telegram/Bale? Use this before moving to a new server, then set the webhook again here.
botsAdmin.saveTokensDesc: Saves bot tokens and optional integration fields only (admin IDs are managed separately).
botsAdmin.cardDescTokens: Bot token and optional integration fields.
botsAdmin.tokenConfigured: Configured — enter a new value to replace
botsAdmin.subtitleFuture: Adding another messenger is a matter of extending the platform list in code.
botsAdmin.saveCardDesc: Saving applies tokens, admin IDs, and registers webhooks when the main bot is enabled.
botsAdmin.configLabelOverrideHint: When set, replaces inbound names from the panel subscription in config lists (bot, portal, dashboard).
botsAdmin.configNamingMovedHint: Config prefix/override and per-inbound names are managed in each reseller's Settings tab (or Reseller settings for your own bot).
botsAdmin.resellerWebhookAutoHint: Reseller webhook URL secrets are created automatically; only paste bot tokens and admin IDs unless support asks for more.
botsAdmin.textWelcomeHint: Optional. Replaces msg.welcome for this reseller bot. Use {name} and {referrer_line}.

diagnostics.title: Bot diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Checks token (getMe), webhook registration, inbound queue, and recent webhook logs.
diagnostics.revealConfirm: Show the full bot token? Only do this in a private session.
diagnostics.rateLimited: Too many requests — wait 30 seconds and try again.
diagnostics.reregisterConfirm: Re-register webhook at Telegram and clear pending updates?
diagnostics.outboundNote: Inbound queue is pending_update_count from Telegram. Outbound test sends one message only when you click Send test.

forceJoinAdmin.sectionDesc: Require users to join your Telegram/Bale channel before using the bot. The bot must be a channel admin for membership checks and pinning.
forceJoinAdmin.chatIdHint: Numeric id (e.g. -100…). Add the bot as channel admin.
forceJoinAdmin.inviteLinkHint: If set, used instead of @username for the join button.
forceJoinAdmin.promptText: Message shown to users who must join
forceJoinAdmin.promptTextHint: Leave empty to use the default bot text (editable in Texts).
forceJoinAdmin.publishError: Could not send or pin message.

notificationsAdmin.title: Notifications
notificationsAdmin.subtitle: User alert defaults, category switches, idle re-engagement, and admin panel-down alerts.
notificationsAdmin.cardDesc: Days before expiry: comma-separated integers (e.g. 3,1,0). You may use negative values for days after expiry (e.g. -1).
notificationsAdmin.expiryDaysHint: Comma-separated integers, e.g. 3,1,0 or include -1 for one day after expiry.
notificationsAdmin.rulesDesc: Master switches; each service can still turn its own alerts off in the bot.
notificationsAdmin.ruleAfterExpire: One-time message after service has expired
notificationsAdmin.idleDesc: Optional gentle ping when a user has no approved purchase for a long time.
notificationsAdmin.idleAfterDays: Minimum days since last approved purchase
notificationsAdmin.idleCooldownDays: Minimum days between idle messages per user
notificationsAdmin.adminDesc: Notify admin Telegram/Bale IDs when the panel login probe fails.
notificationsAdmin.purgeDesc: After the grace period from expires_at, deletes the panel client and soft-deletes the service row. L2TP is not auto-removed. Distinct from the immediate «delete expired linked» action in Configs.
notificationsAdmin.purgeGraceDays: Grace days after expiry before removal
notificationsAdmin.purgeWarnDays: Notify user on these days before removal
notificationsAdmin.purgeWarnDaysHint: Comma-separated, e.g. 7,3,1,0 (0 = removal day, before delete runs).
notificationsAdmin.purgeLastRun: Last cron run: {{at}} — removed {{purged}}, warned {{warned}}, failed {{failed}}
notificationsAdmin.purgeLastRunNever: Purge cron has not run yet (hourly when enabled).

backupAdmin.title: Backups
backupAdmin.subtitle: Interval, destination chat IDs, and where to send backup files.
backupAdmin.cardDesc: Interval, chat targets, and delivery flags.
backupAdmin.storeOnSite: Keep a copy under the site uploads directory (not web-accessible)
backupAdmin.retentionCount: Keep this many backups on disk
backupAdmin.retentionHint: Oldest files are deleted after each successful backup.
backupAdmin.maxZipMbHint: If the zip exceeds this size, the run fails before sending (saves bandwidth).
backupAdmin.storedDesc: Zips kept under uploads when on-site storage is enabled.
backupAdmin.backupRunningAsync: Backup is running on the server. Please wait…
backupAdmin.backupRunningLong: This is taking longer than usual. Scheduled backups need system cron hitting wp-cron.php every few minutes. If it stays stuck, check PHP error logs.
backupAdmin.backupAlreadyRunning: Another backup is already running. Wait a moment or release the lock.
backupAdmin.backupPollTimeout: Backup is taking longer than expected. Refresh the page and check the backup list.
backupAdmin.backupGatewayTimeout: CDN/proxy timed out while starting the backup. The job may still be running in the background — wait and refresh the backup list.
backupAdmin.invalidHtmlResponse: Invalid server response — refresh the page and try again. If it persists, check PHP error logs or server timeout limits.
backupAdmin.invalidHtmlNetworkHint: In DevTools → Network, open the backup/run response body. HTML usually means a security plugin, WAF, or PHP error — not a panel getDb issue.
backupAdmin.storeOffHint: Enable “Keep a copy on site” above, save, then run a backup to see files here.
backupAdmin.panelDbStep_missing_cookie_creds: No panel username/password for cookie session
backupAdmin.cronNotRegistered: Backup WP-Cron is not scheduled — save backup settings once or enable system cron for wp-cron.php.
backupAdmin.cronScheduleMismatch: Cron interval ({{current}}) does not match settings ({{wanted}}) — save backup settings.
backupAdmin.cronKeeperDesc: The plugin pings wp-cron.php about every {{seconds}} seconds on site traffic and after bot webhooks. Active bots usually keep 30-minute backups on time without manual crontab per site.
backupAdmin.cronKeeperNeverPing: No automatic cron ping yet — wait for bot traffic or add server cron below.
backupAdmin.cronServerTitle: Server cron (most accurate — one line per site on the VPS)
backupAdmin.cronServerHint: Add to crontab (crontab -e). Recommended with define('DISABLE_WP_CRON', true); in wp-config.php.
backupAdmin.backupStuckBanner: Backup has been running for several minutes. If it does not finish, release the lock and try again.
backupAdmin.backupResetStuckOk: Lock released. You can run backup again.
backupAdmin.backupDeliveryWarning: Delivery settings incomplete — backup will still run because site storage is enabled.
backupAdmin.restoreWarning: Merge restore: existing WordPress plugin data is kept (users matched by Telegram / Bale / WordPress IDs only). Nothing is deleted from the database.
backupAdmin.restorePanelDbLabel: Also restore panel SQLite from zip to 3x-ui (replaces the live panel database — destructive)
backupAdmin.restorePanelDbHint: Only available when this backup contains panel DB files. Xray restarts automatically on the panel.
backupAdmin.restoreReportErrors: {{n}} issues logged (see server logs if needed).
backupAdmin.delivery_telegram_admins_skipped: Telegram admins: skipped (no admin chat IDs)
backupAdmin.delivery_bale_admins_skipped: Bale admins: skipped (no admin chat IDs)
backupAdmin.storedOnSiteOk: A copy was saved on this site.
backupAdmin.storageFallbackUsed: No destination accepted the file; a copy was saved on this site as fallback.
backupAdmin.deliveryNoneSent: Nothing was sent to Telegram/Bale and on-site storage is off — enable storage or fix delivery settings.
backupAdmin.uploadDesc: Upload a SimpleVPBot backup .zip (same format as scheduled backups).
backupAdmin.uploadConfirmLabel: I confirm merge restore (no data deletion)
backupAdmin.rebuildPanelDesc: Use merge restore for WordPress tables. To push panel SQLite from a zip into 3x-ui, enable “restore panel DB” in the restore dialog. This tool recreates Xray clients from svp_services when you only need clients without replacing the whole panel DB. Panel usage counters may reset after rebuild.
backupAdmin.inboundMapDesc: After restoring panel DB, inbound numbers on 3x-ui may differ from IDs stored in WordPress. Map each DB inbound to the matching inbound on the panel, then save and run rebuild.
backupAdmin.inboundMapSaveDb: Save and update DB inbound IDs
backupAdmin.inboundMapSaveDbOk: Mapping saved; DB rows updated (services: {{services}}, plans: {{plans}}).
backupAdmin.inboundMapPickPanel: Select one panel above to load inbound mapping.
backupAdmin.inboundMapLoadError: Could not load inbounds from panel.
backupAdmin.inboundMapMissing: {{n}} DB inbound(s) have no matching target on the panel yet.
backupAdmin.fix51200Desc: Only services with the wrong 51200 GB cap (or wrongly set to 50 GB) are updated. Volume comes from the linked plan, remark (e.g. · 100 GB), or cache — never guessed. Rows with no known volume are skipped.
backupAdmin.fix51200ConfirmDesc: Only rows with the known 51200 GB mis-scaled cap are updated on 3x-ui and in WordPress. Normal services stay unchanged.
backupAdmin.fix51200Report: Fixed: {{fixed}} · skipped: {{skipped}} · no known volume: {{noSource}} · failed: {{failed}}
backupAdmin.resellerBackfillHint: Re-run one batch (500 rows) of billing meta on transactions and invited_by inference from purchases. A full backfill also runs once on DB upgrade.
backupAdmin.resellerBackfillResult: Billing: updated {{billingUpdated}} / scanned {{billingScanned}} (last tx {{billingLast}}). Invited: updated {{invitedUpdated}} / scanned {{invitedScanned}} (last user {{invitedLast}}).
backupAdmin.rebuildConfirmDesc: Active Xray services in the database will be created or updated on the panel. This may take several minutes. Usage on the panel may reset to zero.

referralAdmin.title: Referral program
referralAdmin.subtitle: Percent reward, payout threshold, and bot usernames for referral links.
referralAdmin.reportsSubtitle: Referral stats, top referrers, and recent /start events.
referralAdmin.cardDesc: Changes apply to new referrals according to server rules.
referralAdmin.settingsReadOnlyHint: Global referral program settings are managed by the site admin. Open Referral reports for your downline stats.
referralAdmin.statReferralOnPurchases: Sum of referral amounts on purchases/renewals
referralAdmin.topReferrersDesc: By approved referral commission totals (last 20 accounts).

unitEconomicsAdmin.title: Unit economics & profitability
unitEconomicsAdmin.subtitle: Live calculator across all panel cost lines. Configure costs per panel under 3x-ui panels.
unitEconomicsAdmin.warnVolumeRequired: Please enter expected or actual monthly sales volume to calculate metrics.
unitEconomicsAdmin.warnLossMaking: Loss-making price: selling price is below total cost per GB.
unitEconomicsAdmin.liveCalcHint: Updates instantly as you change volume, price, or panel costs (after save).
unitEconomicsAdmin.globalInputsDesc: Monthly volume and retail price per GB for the whole service.
unitEconomicsAdmin.receiptPendingHint: Pending receipts (estimate): {{count}} receipts, ~{{gb}} GB — not counted in KPIs.
unitEconomicsAdmin.sharedAllocHint: Panel KPI includes a volume-weighted share of shared fixed costs.

panelEconomics.panelProfitHint: Uses this panel's sold volume (last 30 days) or site-wide manual volume.
panelEconomics.noLines: No lines in this section yet.

sharedEconomics.sectionDesc: Costs for the whole service (bot server, shared DevOps/support, shared traffic). Allocated to each panel by sales volume share.

economicsOverview.title: Profit & loss (unit economics)
economicsOverview.subtitle: Rolling {{days}}-day window — estimated revenue vs costs

resellerSettingsAdmin.title: Settings
resellerSettingsAdmin.desc: Branding and display options for your reseller customers.
resellerSettingsAdmin.configLabelDesc: Optional override for names shown on each config line in the bot and customer portal.
resellerSettingsAdmin.configLabelDescPrefixMode: Site uses prefix+number naming. Set your prefix (e.g. GoatVPN) for labels like InboundName - GoatVPN-1001.
resellerSettingsAdmin.configLabelDescNumberedMode: Site uses numbered naming. Config lines show as InboundName - 1001, InboundName - 1002, …
resellerSettingsAdmin.prefixModeInactiveHint: Advanced naming modes are not enabled site-wide. Ask the site admin under Site settings → Service naming.
resellerSettingsAdmin.inboundDesc: Your custom inbound name appears before each service suffix in customer config lists.
resellerSettingsAdmin.inboundEmpty: Load inbounds after choosing a panel.
resellerSettingsAdmin.configLabelPrefixHint: Overrides the site prefix for your customers when set.
resellerSettingsAdmin.configLabelHint: If set, replaces automatic labels (including prefix+number). Multiple configs: My VPN-1, My VPN-2, …

textsAdmin.title: Bot texts
textsAdmin.subtitle: Edit message and button templates stored in the database.
textsAdmin.placeholdersHint: Placeholders like {name} are replaced by the bot at runtime.
textsAdmin.resetConfirm: Replace this text with the bundled default?
textsAdmin.resetUnknownKey: No default is defined for this key.
textsAdmin.noDefaultHint: No bundled default; reset is disabled for this key.

botUiStudio.title: Bot UI Studio
botUiStudio.subtitle: Drag buttons within each row, set visibility, button color (Telegram), and optional premium custom emoji. Labels come from Bot texts.
botUiStudio.customEmojiHint: Numeric custom_emoji_id from Telegram (shown beside label).
botUiStudio.premiumRequiredHint: Requires Telegram Premium on the bot owner account, or a Fragment username purchase.
botUiStudio.hintInline: Inline service menus use fixed callbacks; you can reorder rows and hide optional actions (e.g. extra user slot when pricing is off).
botUiStudio.confirmDeleteRow: Remove this row? Buttons stay available to drag into other rows.
botUiStudio.dragAcrossRowsHint: Drag chips across rows; empty rows are drop targets.
botUiStudio.noRowsHint: No rows yet — add a row, then drag buttons here.

siteSettings.title: Site settings
siteSettings.subtitle: Whitelabel, service naming, Telegram proxy, notifications, logs, and reseller defaults.

common.saveInvalidTab: Could not save — invalid settings tab.
common.saveNoRest: Dashboard API is not available. Refresh the page.
common.saveNetworkError: Network error while saving. Check your connection and try again.

whitelabel.brandingDesc: Sidebar name and icon shown in the admin dashboard.
whitelabel.siteNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use WordPress site title
whitelabel.customDomainHint: CNAME this host to your WordPress site; visitors are redirected to /dashboard/
whitelabel.generalDesc: Bot enablement, portal page, and crisis controls.
whitelabel.configLabelPrefixHint: Used for labels like GoatVPN-1001, GoatVPN-1002. If empty, reseller brand or site name is used.
whitelabel.configLabelNumberStartHint: First number per service subscription (default 1001). Each extra config line increments by 1.
whitelabel.configLabelOverrideHint: When set, replaces inbound names from panel subscription fragments in config lists (bot, portal, dashboard).
whitelabel.configLabelOverrideHintPrefixMode: If filled, replaces the prefix+number pattern above for all config lines.
whitelabel.adminsDesc: One numeric ID per line for Telegram and Bale admin alerts.
whitelabel.receiptsDesc: One reason per line; shown when rejecting payment receipts.
whitelabel.supportDesc: Contact info shown in the bot support menu and error messages.
whitelabel.supportInfoPlaceholder: Hours, response time, or instructions for users.

serviceNaming.modeDesc: How new services are labeled in config lists (#fragment). Optionally prepend an inbound alias you configure below.
serviceNaming.configLabelPrefixHint: Used for GoatVPN-1001 style suffixes when prefix+number mode is active.
serviceNaming.configLabelNumberStartHint: First number per subscription (default 1001). Each extra config line increments by 1.
serviceNaming.configLabelOverrideHint: Optional suffix override when not using prefix+number mode.
serviceNaming.prependInbound: Prepend inbound name in config label
serviceNaming.prependInboundHint: When on, uses only aliases you set below (not the panel inbound remark). When off, only the service suffix is shown.
serviceNaming.configLabelOverrideHintPrefixMode: Replaces automatic prefix/number suffix for all config lines.
serviceNaming.inboundDesc: Per-inbound aliases used only when “Prepend inbound name” is enabled above.
serviceNaming.inboundEmpty: Load inbounds after choosing a panel (requires synced panel clients).

proxy.title: Telegram HTTP proxy
proxy.desc: Route Bot API calls through HTTP or SOCKS5 when api.telegram.org is blocked.
proxy.apiBaseHint: Optional. Leave empty for official API. Token is appended as /bot{token}/.

relay.title: Telegram relay server
relay.desc: Offload webhook ingress and Bot API calls to a fast Node.js VPS. Dashboard talks to the relay through WordPress only.
relay.baseUrlHint: Internal URL WordPress uses (POST /internal/*, /bot{token}/). Must match RELAY_SHARED_SECRET on the relay.
relay.publicUrlPlaceholder: Same as API URL or CDN in front
relay.wpForwardHint: Where the relay forwards Telegram updates. Default: your public site URL.
relay.sharedSecretHint: Must match RELAY_SHARED_SECRET in relay .env. Leave blank to keep current.
relay.rotateOk: New secret generated — copy it to relay .env and save.
relay.statusDesc: Live connection to your relay VPS (via WordPress).
relay.force: Force all Telegram traffic via relay
relay.allowedIpsHint: Optional comma-separated IPs for ALLOWED_WP_IPS on the relay server.
relay.hubDesc: Manage VPS relay from WordPress. Admin via VPS IP (443). Domain is for Telegram only.
relay.wizIp: Enter VPS IP in Connection tab
relay.wizDomain: Set Telegram domain + Sync domains + SSL

notifications.ipDesc: Warn admins when many distinct IPs use the same service in a short window.
notifications.trafficStaleDays: Days without traffic sync before stale alert

finance.title: Infrastructure payment reminders
finance.desc: Telegram/Bale alerts before panel cost lines expire, and how far to extend renewal after marking paid.
finance.notifyEnabled: Notify admins before cost line expiry
finance.reminderDaysHint: Comma-separated offsets (e.g. 7,1,0 = 7 days, 1 day, same day).
finance.extendDaysOnPaid: Days to extend expiry when marked paid
finance.cryptoDesc: Automatic crypto checkout via NOWPayments. Keys are encrypted at rest.

purge.title: Auto-remove expired services
purge.subtitle: Grace period, user warnings, manual purge, and preview of expired Xray services.
purge.settingsDesc: Hourly cron removes panel clients and soft-deletes services after the grace period. L2TP is excluded.
purge.actionsDesc: Run the same logic as cron, purge ready services now, or delete immediately without grace.
purge.previewDesc: Xray services past expires_at that are still linked in the database.
purge.purgeGraceDays: Grace days after expiry before removal
purge.purgeWarnDays: Notify user on these days before removal
purge.purgeWarnDaysHint: Comma-separated, e.g. 7,3,1,0 (0 = removal day, before delete runs).
purge.purgeLastRunNever: Purge cron has not run yet (hourly when enabled).
purge.runCronHint: Scans up to 30 expired services: sends warnings and removes those past grace.
purge.purgeReadyHint: Deletes services whose grace period has ended (no new warnings).
purge.purgeReadyConfirm: Remove all services past the grace period (batch up to 50)?
purge.immediateDesc: Deletes any DB-expired linked Xray client on the selected panel — ignores grace days.
purge.immediateHint: Use only for cleanup. Distinct from grace-based auto-purge above.
purge.immediateAck: I understand this deletes expired services immediately without grace.
purge.deleteOneEarlyConfirm: This service is still in the grace period. Remove anyway?
purge.noRows: No expired linked Xray services match this filter.

logs.empty: No log rows match your filters.
logs.clearDesc: Deletes rows from the plugin log table. This cannot be undone.
logs.clearOlderHint: Use “Delete all” to truncate the entire table.

resellers.defaultsDesc: Applied when a reseller has no custom permission row yet.
resellers.editDesc: Overrides defaults for the selected reseller account.

logsAdmin.title: Logs
logsAdmin.subtitle: Operational logs are not streamed inside this dashboard.
logsAdmin.whereDesc: PHP, web server, and cron output are the usual sources of truth.
logsAdmin.hintPhp: PHP application debug log under the site content directory (if debug logging is enabled).
logsAdmin.hintWebserver: Nginx or Apache access and error logs for this vhost.
logsAdmin.hintHost: Hosting control panel log viewer or SSH log tail on the server.
logsAdmin.noTail: This UI does not read log files from disk for security reasons.

auditAdmin.title: Audit log
auditAdmin.subtitle: Security, billing, and reseller actions recorded for site administrators.
auditAdmin.empty: No audit rows match your filters.
auditAdmin.summary_receipt_reject_after_approve: Receipt #{{receipt}} rejected after approval (transaction #{{tx}}, service #{{service}}). Reason: {{reason}}.
auditAdmin.summary_receipt_amount_adjust: Receipt #{{receipt}} amount for user #{{user}} changed from {{old}} to {{new}} (delta {{delta}}, status {{status}}).
auditAdmin.summary_dashboard_login_fail: Failed dashboard login attempt for username «{{login}}».
auditAdmin.summary_panel_rebuild_from_db: Panel rebuild from DB — complete: {{done}}, total services: {{total}}, next offset: {{next}}.
auditAdmin.summary_bot_reseller_save: Reseller bot profile for user #{{user}} saved (enabled: {{enabled}}).
auditAdmin.summary_reseller_inbound_labels_save: Inbound labels saved for reseller #{{user}} ({{count}} entries).

planCatsAdmin.title: Plan categories
planCatsAdmin.subtitle: Categories are scoped per 3x-ui panel.
planCatsAdmin.deleteDesc: Deletion fails if plans still use this slug on the panel.
planCatsAdmin.errorCode_invalid: Category data is incomplete or invalid.
planCatsAdmin.errorCode_panel_not_allowed: You are not allowed to manage categories on this panel.
planCatsAdmin.errorCode_category_foreign_plans: This category is used by plans outside your reseller account.
planCatsAdmin.errorCode_inuse: Cannot delete: plans still use this category slug on the panel.
planCatsAdmin.errorCode_dup: A category with this slug already exists on the panel.

panelsAdmin.title: 3x-ui panels
panelsAdmin.subtitle: Add, edit, toggle, or remove panel rows used by plans.
panelsAdmin.urlWebBaseHint: If the panel uses a web base path, include it at the end of the URL (e.g. https://host:2053/abc/).
panelsAdmin.authEitherHint: Provide an API token (recommended) or username + password for cookie login.
panelsAdmin.tokenConfigured: A token is already saved for this panel.
panelsAdmin.apiTokenHint: From 3x-ui Settings → Security → API Token. Bearer auth skips login/CSRF.
panelsAdmin.apiTokenKeep: Leave blank to keep current token
panelsAdmin.deleteDesc: Deletion fails if plans or services still reference this panel.
panelsAdmin.passwordHint: Stored passwords are never shown in the table.
panelsAdmin.passwordKeep: Leave blank to keep current password
panelsAdmin.testDialogDesc: Runs login and read-only API probes for this panel row.

inboundLinkAdmin.title: Panel config linking
inboundLinkAdmin.subtitle: Load inbounds and clients from a 3x-ui panel, see which bot user owns each client, link orphans by bot user id, or run auto-link heuristics.
inboundLinkAdmin.noPanels: No panel rows — add one under 3x-ui panels.
inboundLinkAdmin.autolinkConfirm: Run automatic linking for this inbound? The bot tries to match identifiers in remarks/comments to bot users.
inboundLinkAdmin.autolinkOk: Auto-link finished. Reload clients to see updates.
inboundLinkAdmin.onlyUnlinked: Only clients not linked to a bot user
inboundLinkAdmin.badLinkParams: Enter a search (2+ characters) and pick a user, or type a unique query / numeric bot user id.
inboundLinkAdmin.userSearchHint: Type 2+ characters or pick a row below.
inboundLinkAdmin.resolveAmbiguous: Multiple users matched — narrow your search.

configsAdmin.title: Configs
configsAdmin.subtitle: Xray plans per 3x-ui panel (inbound per plan). Enable clients, reset traffic, delete, link bot users, and open QR for subscription or primary URI.
configsAdmin.autoSyncHint: Data syncs with the panel automatically when you open this tab, change the panel scope, or return to the tab.
configsAdmin.statsLine: Snapshot (last sync): {{total}} clients · {{enabled}} enabled · {{disabled}} disabled · {{online}} online now · {{expired}} expired · {{linked}} linked · {{unlinked}} unlinked
configsAdmin.statsHint: Counts follow the same panel sync as the lists below.
configsAdmin.clientsListPagedHint: Linked clients are paginated inside each plan; orphans are in a separate section. Charts and summary use the full snapshot.
configsAdmin.orphanConfigsHint: Panel clients not linked to a bot user, or linked services missing a plan. Link or assign a plan from here.
configsAdmin.noOrphanConfigs: No unlinked or plan-less configs on this panel.
configsAdmin.expiryMismatchHint: Note: the service row in the database shows a different expiry time than the panel; the panel value is used here.
configsAdmin.noPanels: No panels — add one under 3x-ui panels.
configsAdmin.noPlans: No Xray plans with inbound for the selected scope.
configsAdmin.truncated: Some lists are truncated (panel client cap per inbound).
configsAdmin.quickAddHint: Creates a bot service from this plan for the selected user (admin / free mode).
configsAdmin.defaultUserHint: No default bot user for your site account — pick a user explicitly.
configsAdmin.deleteExpiredHint: Removes panel clients for linked Xray services whose DB expiry is past (max 50 per run). Type the shown count and check the box to confirm. Available only when a single panel is selected.
configsAdmin.deleteExpiredAck: I understand this irreversible batch delete.
configsAdmin.purgeMovedHint: {{count}} DB-expired linked service(s) on this panel. Removal (grace-based or immediate) moved to Site settings → Expired purge.
configsAdmin.deleteOneLinked: This will remove the linked service from the panel and soft-delete the service row.
configsAdmin.deleteOneOrphan: This removes the orphan client from the panel only.
configsAdmin.qrClickCopyHint: Click a QR image to copy its URL to the clipboard.
configsAdmin.partialSyncNotice: Some panel operations had issues (details below).
configsAdmin.ipsPlaceholder: View IPs reported by the panel for this client email.
configsAdmin.ipsEmpty: No IP records for this client.
configsAdmin.batchMax: Select at most {{max}} clients for one batch.
configsAdmin.batchSinglePanelOnly: Batch actions are only available when a single panel is selected.
configsAdmin.batchPartial: {{ok}} succeeded; {{fail}} failed. Refresh and retry failed rows if needed.
configsAdmin.confirmMismatch: Confirmation number does not match the batch size. Refresh and try again.
configsAdmin.cacheStaleBanner: Some data may be stale (traffic / IPs). Auto-sync runs when you open or revisit this tab.
configsAdmin.needsSyncBanner: Local cache is built from the panel API.
configsAdmin.assignPlanHint: Sets the bot plan on linked services for the current panel; only services on the same inbound as the chosen plan will succeed.
configsAdmin.applyCanonicalIdentityHint: Rename panel client to canonical label (e.g. Heydas-1001) and update the service record.

dashboardLogin.title: Sign in
dashboardLogin.subtitle: Sign in with your site account to open the dashboard.
dashboardLogin.error: Sign-in failed. Check your credentials and try again.
dashboardLogin.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

loginFormDemo.cardDescription: Enter your email below to sign in to your account

l2tpAdmin.title: L2TP servers
l2tpAdmin.subtitle: SSH access and L2TP host configuration for automation.
l2tpAdmin.deleteDesc: This removes the row from the catalog.
l2tpAdmin.secretsHint: Ciphertext is not shown; enter new values only when rotating secrets.
l2tpAdmin.secretReplaceHint: Leave blank to keep existing value

role.switchHint: Switch how you use the dashboard for this account.

search.title: Search menu
search.usersEmpty: No user matches. Try name, @username, or numeric ID.

usersBulkAdmin.title: Bulk user operations
usersBulkAdmin.subtitle: Dry-run first, then enqueue a job and process it with the worker.
usersBulkAdmin.scopeHint: Choose who receives the bulk change.
usersBulkAdmin.resellerScopeHint: For resellers, "All approved users" and other scopes are limited to your own invite subtree (not global).
usersBulkAdmin.scopeActiveSvc: Active panel clients (recommended for volume / extend)
usersBulkAdmin.scopePanelActive: All active clients on panel (from panel cache)
usersBulkAdmin.scopePanelVolumeHint: Volume and extend apply per active client on the panel using live quota and expiry — not database totals.
usersBulkAdmin.reduceVolume: Apply as volume reduction instead of increase
usersBulkAdmin.reduceDays: Apply as day reduction instead of extension
usersBulkAdmin.notifyMessageHint: Use {name} for the user's name. Empty uses a default message. Variables: {extra_gb}, {days}, {extra_users}.
usersBulkAdmin.notifyPlaceholderVolume: {name} dear, {extra_gb} GB was added to your active subscriptions.
usersBulkAdmin.notifyPlaceholderExtend: {name} dear, {days} days were added to your active subscriptions.
usersBulkAdmin.notifyPlaceholderSlots: {name} dear, concurrent user limit on your active subscriptions increased by {extra_users}.
usersBulkAdmin.filterServerHint: When set, only services on this panel/inbound are changed (user scope still applies above).
usersBulkAdmin.dryRunEmpty: No users match the selected scope and filters.
usersBulkAdmin.composeHint: Choose audience, filters, and operation. Dry-run previews impact before enqueueing.
usersBulkAdmin.previewDryRunEmpty: Run a dry run to see how many users or panel clients match.
usersBulkAdmin.cronHint: Jobs are processed by the users-bulk cron worker. You can also run the queue manually below.
usersBulkAdmin.processQueueDone: Ran {{batches}} batch(es). Refresh if counts look stale.

userMergeAdmin.title: Merge duplicate users
userMergeAdmin.subtitle: Combine two bot user rows: one account is kept; the other is merged into it.
userMergeAdmin.pickHint: Enter internal user IDs (svp_users.id). Preview before merging.
userMergeAdmin.countsHint: Review services, wallet, and referrals before confirming.
userMergeAdmin.confirmCheck: I understand this cannot be undone

layout.userPortalSoon: Your portal content will be expanded here.
layout.userPortalDesc: Subscription links and traffic for your active services.
layout.adminUnknownSection: No data for this section or unknown tab.
layout.personaSwitchBlockedImpersonation: You cannot switch persona while impersonating a reseller. Stop impersonation first.

resellerFinance.balanceHint: Shown in toman; purchases for your customers debit this wallet.
resellerFinance.approvedReceiptsHint: Receipts tied to your bot users in your scope (approved only).
resellerFinance.approvedReceiptsEmpty: No approved receipts in this sample.
resellerFinance.topUpHint: Creates a pending top-up transaction and sends payment instructions to Telegram/Bale when linked; otherwise complete payment and upload receipt per site rules.
resellerFinance.topUpSentBot: Payment keyboard sent to your Telegram/Bale if linked.
resellerFinance.topUpNoBot: No Telegram/Bale on file — pay manually and upload the receipt; reference the transaction id with support.

resellerCharge.title: Charge account
resellerCharge.subtitle: Wallet balance, top-up, and customer purchases debited from your wallet. Use the Receipts tab to review payment slips.
resellerCharge.balanceHint: In toman; creating or renewing services for customers debits this balance.
resellerCharge.customerChargesHint: Approved purchases billed to your wallet (shown as negative amounts).
resellerCharge.customerChargesEmpty: No customer purchases debited from your wallet yet.

mutateErrors.forbiddenOp: This operation is not allowed for your account.
mutateErrors.forbiddenPerm: You do not have permission for this action.
mutateErrors.forbiddenScope: This user or service is outside your reseller scope.
mutateErrors.referrerCycle: This referrer assignment would create a cycle.
mutateErrors.notReseller: The selected account is not a reseller.
mutateErrors.forbiddenPlan: You can only use plans you own for this customer.
mutateErrors.moduleMissing: A required module is missing on the server.
mutateErrors.noPaymentMethods: No payment method is enabled for checkout.
